mapper.sql: p.post_id, p.category, p.title, p.content, p.author_user_id, COALESCE(u.display_name, '탈퇴한 사용자') AS author_display_name, p.related_property_id, rp.name AS related_property_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(rp.road_address, ''), NULLIF(rp.jibun_address, ''), CONCAT_WS(' ', rp.sido, rp.sigungu, rp.legal_dong)) AS related_property_address, p.view_count, COALESCE(cc.comment_count, 0) AS comment_count, p.created_at, p.updated_at

LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = p.author_user_id LEFT JOIN properties rp ON rp.property_id = p.related_property_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM community_comments WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY post_id ) cc ON cc.post_id = p.post_id

choose.when: ORDER BY p.view_count DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.post_id DESC
ORDER BY COALESCE(cc.comment_count, 0) DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.post_id DESC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.post_id DESC

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_posts p WHERE

SELECT
FROM community_posts p
WHERE p.post_id = #{postId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE community_posts SET view_count = view_count + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_posts ( category, title, content, author_user_id, related_property_id ) VALUES ( #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{authorUserId}, #{relatedPropertyId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE community_posts SET category = #{category}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, related_property_id = #{relatedPropertyId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE community_posts SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.parent_comment_id, c.author_user_id, COALESCE(u.display_name, '탈퇴한 사용자') AS author_display_name, c.content, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM community_comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = c.author_user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.parent_comment_id IS NULL THEN c.comment_id ELSE c.parent_comment_id END ASC, CASE WHEN c.parent_comment_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, c.created_at ASC, c.comment_id ASC

SELECT c.comment_id, c.post_id, c.parent_comment_id, c.author_user_id, COALESCE(u.display_name, '탈퇴한 사용자') AS author_display_name, c.content, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM community_comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = c.author_user_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{commentId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_comments ( post_id, parent_comment_id, author_user_id, content ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{parentCommentId}, #{authorUserId}, #{content} )
mapper.update: UPDATE community_comments SET content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE community_comments SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
